title: United Airlines' (UAL) 52 Boeing 777s Receive FAA Clearance

text: United Airlines (UAL) now expects average fuel price per gallon for Q2 to be $4.02.

title: United Airlines says regulators approved return of Boeing 777s
text: US air safety regulators have cleared United Airlines to resume service on more than 50 Boeing 777 planes that were grounded over engine issues, a United executive said Tuesday.

title: United Airlines Holdings, Inc.'s (UAL) Management Presents at Bank of America 29th Annual Transportation, Airlines and Industrials Conference 2022 - (Transcript)
text: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:UAL ) Bank of America 29th Annual Transportation, Airlines and Industrials Conference 2022 May 17, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Andrew Nocella - Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer Conference Call Participants Unidentified Company Representative It is great to be back in Boston in person at this great venue after a two-year hiatus given the pandemic. We have a great line up of airlines today and I think everyone in attendance will be focused on a few things, one is the health of the consumer traveler and we'll have United Airlines kicking things off in a little bit, they've put out an update last night that I think they'll have some pretty good insight into the current trends here.

title: United Airlines Cites “Strongest Environment We've Ever Seen” As Demand And Fares Rise
text: United Airlines got a lift Tuesday from a strong outlook, including higher unit revenue projections, and from the Federal Aviation's move to approve the return of its Boeing 777 fleet, grounded for more than a year.

title: United Airlines Gets FAA Clearance to Fly 52 Boeing 777s
text: The airline expects to start ramping up capacity as early as next week, hoping to bring back as many as 35 jets by July.

title: Why United Airlines Shares Are Trading Higher Today
text: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UAL) updated its financial outlook for second-quarter 2022. The company stated that the demand environment has continued to improve following the previous guidance, resulting in a higher unit revenue outlook for Q2.

title: United Airlines stock jumps after passenger revenue, capacity outlook raised
text: Shares of United Airlines Holdings Inc. UAL, +0.62% jumped 4.7% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the air carrier raised its passenger revenue outlook, citing an improving demand environment. United disclosed late Monday in a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission that it now expects second-quarter total revenue per available seat mile (TRASM) to be up 23% to 25% from the same period in pre-pandemic 2019, compared with previous guidance of a rise of about 17%.

title: United Airlines Stock Rises as Revenue Outlook Boosted Amid Higher Demand
text: The airline says it expects passenger revenue in the second quarter to rise as much as 25% from 2019.

title: United Airlines lifts second-quarter revenue forecast
text: United Airlines Holdings Inc on Monday raised its revenue estimate for the current quarter despite trimming capacity, underscoring a booming travel demand.

title: United Airlines (UAL) Inks Tentative Deal With Pilots' Union
text: United Airlines (UAL) reaches an agreement in principle with its pilots' union on better pay and other improvements amid labor tensions among other major U.S. airlines.

title: United Airlines Reaches Agreement With Pilots Union
text: Shares of United Airlines Holdings (NASDAQ: UAL) rallied 3.66% at 11:15 ET on Friday morning following the news that the airline reached an agreement with its pilots' labor union on new contract terms. CNBC reported that United is the first major carrier to strike a deal with its pilots since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, which [.

title: United Airlines reaches new contract deal with pilots' union
text: United Airlines Holdings Inc Chief Executive Scott Kirby said on Friday the carrier and its pilots' union had reached an agreement in principle on new contract terms.

title: United Airlines Reaches New Agreement With Pilots' Union
text: United is the first major carrier to reach an agreement in principle with its union after months of negotiations.

title: United reaches new contract deal with pilots union, the first of the major airlines in pandemic
text: United is the first major U.S. airline to reach an agreement with its pilots.

title: The Travel Sector Is Getting Upgraded
text: As bad as the outlook for inflation and the economy is, the times are good for the travel industry. The travel industry has been shackled for the last 2+ years and is finally coming out of those dark times.

title: United Airlines (UAL) Inks Deal With Neste for SAF in Amsterdam
text: United Airlines (UAL) can buy up to 52.5 million gallons of SAF in the next three years for its flights at Amsterdam's Schiphol Airport as part of its agreement with Neste.

title: United Airlines Is on the Road to Recovery
text: United Airlines Holdings Inc. ( UAL , Financial) delivered good results for the first quarter of 2022, surpassing Wall Street's expectations in terms of both revenue and earnings. Management announced it is expecting the highest quarterly revenue in the second quarter, which makes many of us wonder if the airline major's business truly made such an amazing recovery after the Covid-19 impact.
